name: Ham Curing
recipeInstructions:
This amount is sufficient for 8 hams.
1. Combine the salt, pepper, and white sugar in a large bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Rub each ham thoroughly with the mixture, making sure to coat it evenly.
4. Place some of the mixture into the shank bone of each ham.
5. Wrap each ham tightly in brown paper.
6. Place the wrapped hams in cloth bags.
7. Hang the hams with the shank bones hanging down.
